bob-chat.title: Bob Chat Skill
instructions: Answer the current user message only.
Return only minified JSON matching the outputTemplate.
metadata.emotion must be one allowed Bob emotion.
factoids must include only durable user facts explicitly supported by the current user message.
Use an empty factoids array when no new durable user fact appears.
No markdown fences. No text outside JSON.

web-search.title: Web Search Skill
instructions: Answer the user using only the provided search.results.
Return only minified JSON matching the outputTemplate.
Do not invent facts beyond the provided search results.
sources must copy the real title, url, and snippet values used.
factoids must include only durable user facts explicitly supported by the user prompt.
Use an empty factoids array when no new durable user fact appears.
No markdown fences. No text outside JSON.
